hero.title: Do you dare to use 365 days to witness a complete transformation?
hero.subtitle: The hourglass of time is bursting with thunder. When the quantitative change breaks through the critical point, every morning and evening you work hard will turn into a sea of stars!

feature1.title: Use modern technology
feature1.description: More modern component library, free to customize each component

feature2.title: Easy to deploy
feature2.description: One-click deployment to your server, no complicated configuration required

feature3.title: Open source code
feature3.description: Every line of code is open source, you can modify and extend it freely

feature4.title: Community support
feature4.description: You can find help in the community and share your experience

authLayout.logoAlt: Calendar and helper icon — house help scheduling
authLayout.headline: Run domestic help bookings without the chaos.
authLayout.subheadline: Assign workers, confirm time slots, and keep households and agencies aligned — from one calm, structured workspace.
authLayout.footer: Built for coordinators who manage cleaners, caregivers, and home help every day.

systemConfig.createdToast: System config created with default value.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Update your account settings. Set your preferred language and timezone.
account.name: Name
account.nameDescription: This is the name that will be displayed on your profile and in emails.
account.dobDescription: Your date of birth is used to calculate your age.
account.languageDescription: This is the language that will be used in the dashboard.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: This is how others will see you on the site.
profile.usernameDescription: This is your public display name. It can be your real name or a pseudonym. You can only change this once every 30 days.
profile.emailDescription: You can manage verified email addresses in your email settings.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little bit about yourself
profile.bioDescriptionAfter: other users and organizations to link to them.
profile.urlsDescription: Add links to your website, blog, or social media profiles.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Customize the appearance of the app. Automatically switch between day and night themes.
appearance.systemDescription: Appearance preferences for theme and font.
appearance.fontDescription: Set the font you want to use in the dashboard.
appearance.themeDescription: Select the theme for the dashboard.

display.title: Display
display.subtitle: Turn items on or off to control what's displayed in the app.
display.sidebarDescription: Select the items you want to display in the sidebar.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Configure how you receive notifications.
notifications.communicationDesc: Receive emails about your account activity.
notifications.marketingDesc: Receive emails about new products, features, and more.
notifications.socialDesc: Receive emails for friend requests, follows, and more.
notifications.securityDesc: Receive emails about your account activity and security.
